commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an ACP-core URL-userinfo redaction regex and a regression test for password-bearing and token-only URL credentials.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +17. Total +18 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. this is source-reproducible: the configured ACP wrapper installs the app redactor, and ACP-core returns that redactor before running the newly patched fallback patterns. I did not run a live ACP backend session in this read-only review.
